title: Refactor arquitectónico — pasos 1 a 3 del plan de auditoría
summary: Migración de hooks a factories de query keys, schemas Zod movidos a lib/ y barrels públicos por feature.

changes: useInvoices, useNextInvoiceNumber, useInvoicesWithBalance, useStampCfdi, useCancelCfdi, useRefreshCancellationStatus, useGenerateRecurringInvoices → invoiceKeys
step1_query_keys.bug_fixed: useInvoice(id) usaba ['invoices', id] que colisionaba con la lista ['invoices'] de useInvoices; ahora usa invoiceKeys.detail(id) = ['invoices','detail',id].

step3_barrels.lint_rule: no-restricted-imports cross-feature permanece en 'warn' hasta migración total de imports; barrels listos para consumirse.
